channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Thursday, February 19
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 03:47 AM (1.505 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 10:49 AM (-0.091 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: W 15 mph
